asset.title: App Research Enrich
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates the automated enrichment of account profiles using background agents, supported by a live execution trace.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the transition from pending accounts to enriched profiles via an explicit trigger.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the entire lifecycle from pending status, active execution, to final completion.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed spreadsheet layout with a well-integrated trace panel.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet and agent trace paradigm of the platform.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state updates and log outputs.

legibility.evidence: Text and status badges are readable, though some table cells are truncated.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly applicable for GTM teams looking to automate account intelligence gathering.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts sequential processing times and detailed agent logs.

defects.observed: Research text in the table is truncated, hiding the full output details.
defects.fix: Increase column width or add a hover tooltip to display full research text.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeAgents automatically research and enrich pending accounts in real-time, with full execution visibility in the Room Trace.
